mapper.insert: INSERT INTO provider_channel_model(tenant_id, provider_channel_id, upstream_model_id, upstream_display_name, source_type, supports_streaming, supports_tool_calling, supports_vision, supports_cache, enabled, last_synced_at, last_sync_summary, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{tenantId}, #{providerChannelId}, #{upstreamModelId}, #{upstreamDisplayName}, #{sourceType}, #{supportsStreaming}, #{supportsToolCalling}, #{supportsVision}, #{supportsCache}, #{enabled}, #{lastSyncedAt}, #{lastSyncSummary}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, provider_channel_id, upstream_model_id, upstream_display_name, source_type, supports_streaming, supports_tool_calling, supports_vision, supports_cache, enabled, last_synced_at, last_sync_summary, deleted_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM provider_channel_model WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT cm.id, cm.tenant_id, cm.provider_channel_id, c.name AS channel_name, cm.upstream_model_id, cm.upstream_display_name, cm.source_type, cm.supports_streaming, cm.supports_tool_calling, cm.supports_vision, cm.supports_cache, CASE WHEN cm.enabled = TRUE THEN 'ENABLED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status, cm.last_synced_at, cm.last_sync_summary, cm.created_at, cm.updated_at FROM provider_channel_model cm JOIN provider_channel c ON c.id = cm.provider_channel_id WHERE cm.provider_channel_id = #{channelId} AND cm.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY cm.created_at DESC, cm.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE provider_channel_model SET upstream_model_id = #{upstreamModelId}, upstream_display_name = #{upstreamDisplayName}, supports_streaming = #{supportsStreaming}, supports_tool_calling = #{supportsToolCalling}, supports_vision = #{supportsVision}, supports_cache = #{supportsCache}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_channel_model SET enabled = #{enabled}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_channel_model SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), enabled = FALSE WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_model_candidate_mapping WHERE provider_channel_model_id = #{channelModelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
